Market Research Step

Research Before You Create

The kit guides you to look at similar products, services, videos, or offers before creating your own, so you are not guessing blindly.

  • Research Etsy, Gumroad, Fiverr, TikTok, YouTube, and more
  • Look for demand signals like reviews and comments
  • Write down what you can improve

Before You Buy

What You Should Expect

This kit will not build the business for you. It will not guarantee income, traffic, sales, or results. What it will do is give you a clear, beginner-friendly starting point — prompts, worksheets, and a 30-day plan — so you can choose an idea and take your next steps with more confidence.

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

What format are the files and how do I open them?
All files are standard PDF documents. You can open them on any device — phone, tablet, or computer — using a free PDF reader such as Adobe Acrobat Reader, Apple Books, or your browser's built-in PDF viewer.
Do I need any other tools or paid subscriptions to use this kit?
No. Everything you need to get started is included in the kit. The AI prompts work with free tools like ChatGPT's free tier. No extra software, subscriptions, or purchases are required.
Will this work if I have never used AI tools before?
Yes — this kit was built specifically for complete beginners. The Read Me First guide walks you through exactly where to start, and the prompts are ready to copy and paste straight into any AI tool.
What is your refund policy?
Because this is an instant-access digital download, all sales are final unless otherwise stated on the WarriorPlus checkout page or required by applicable law. Please read the product description carefully before purchasing.
Is this a business opportunity or income system?
No. This is an educational digital starter kit. It provides beginner-friendly planning resources, prompts, checklists, and worksheets. Your results depend on your effort, decisions, market, product quality, consistency, and many other factors. No income or results are guaranteed.

Optional Resources — Available After You Finish The Starter Kit

The starter kit stands completely on its own and is enough to begin. Once you have worked through it and taken your first steps, optional upgrade resources may be available for people who want to go further — such as launch templates, product builders, or traffic planning tools.

You do not need any upgrades to get started. Everything you need to choose an idea, plan your first offer, and take your first steps is included in this kit.

Important Notices & Disclaimers

Earnings & Income Disclaimer
This product is provided for educational and informational purposes only. No income, sales, traffic, rankings, followers, leads, engagement, commissions, downloads, or business outcomes are guaranteed. Individual results will vary and depend on many factors including effort, consistency, niche selection, product quality, audience, platform rules, market demand, skills, and actions taken. Any examples mentioned are not typical and are not guarantees of what you will earn or achieve.
Product Disclaimer
This product does not constitute legal, financial, tax, business, advertising, or platform compliance advice. Always conduct your own research and due diligence before making business decisions. Follow the rules and terms of service of any platform you use.
AI-Generated Content Notice
Some content in this kit involves the use of AI tools. All AI-generated content should be reviewed, edited, fact-checked, and personalized before use. You are responsible for the accuracy and appropriateness of any content you produce or publish using this kit.
License Terms
This kit is sold under a personal-use license. The kit itself — its files, content, and design — may not be resold, redistributed, rebranded, shared, or included as a bonus inside another paid product without written permission. However, anything you create using the worksheets, prompts, and planning tools — such as your own products, services, or content — is yours to use in your own business.
Digital Product & Refund Notice
This is a digital product. No physical item will be shipped. After purchase you will receive immediate access to downloadable PDF files. Please ensure you have a PDF reader before purchasing.
